---
title: "Welcome" 
description: "Spring 2020-2021"
date: 2021-01-30T09:45:00-03:00
output:
  html_document:
    toc: true
    toc_float:
        collapsed: true
        smooth_scroll: true
    toc_depth: 3
    fig_caption: yes
    code_folding: show
    number_sections: true

fontsize: 14pt
tags: []
comments: false
---

Dear all,

`r emo::ji("loudspeaker")` 

You will find useful links and lecture notes here on this blog, built for Hacettepe University Mining Engineering Spring 2020-2021 lectures  given by me. You can navigate through the "Tags" that are attached to each post in corresponding dates for upcoming lectures.  


Good luck,

`r emo::ji("sun")` GERTUNC
